items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of the 'Third-party extension code review process' but lacks concrete evidence to confirm whether this scenario has been executed or tested. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide any direct evidence of the scenario being validated, leading to an inconclusive status. Without specific traces or snapshots from the execution of this scenario, it is impossible to determine if the expected result has been achieved.
